palette: Weathered Victorian brick red, oxidized copper green, damp charcoal pavement, and warm tungsten filament yellow.
lighting: A moody London afternoon with soft, diffused gray skylight punctuated by sharp warm glows from shop windows and interior lamps.
material_friction: Damp soot-stained brick, porous limestone, slick wet asphalt, and the fine grain of a roasted coffee bean surface.
instagram_prompts: First-person perspective (FPP) from a low-angle wide-angle 14mm lens. The sharp, damp, soot-stained Victorian brick wall of a Shoreditch building is in the immediate foreground. In the mid-ground, a classic red London double-decker bus is clearly visible and in sharp focus against the gray, overcast sky. The world feels enormous and architectural. Moody charcoal colors, deep focus, sharp details. No robots, no drones, no mechanical parts in frame. 4K high fidelity.

First-person perspective (FPP) wide-angle POV from a low-profile vantage point inside Aethos Shoreditch. The sharp, dark-grained oak of a side table is in the foreground. In the mid-ground, a large, floor-to-ceiling window overlooks the sharp and recognizable Shoreditch urban landscape, including the iconic Old Street station signage visible below. Cinematic moody London lighting, soft gray daylight mixing with warm tungsten interior glows. Deep focus, sharp details across the room and out the window. No robots, no drones, no mechanical parts in frame.

First-person perspective (FPP) wide-angle POV skimming a sharp, rusted iron railing on a Shoreditch street corner. In the mid-ground, a sharp and colorful piece of Shoreditch street art graffiti is fully in focus on a nearby brick wall. The ground below shows slick, wet charcoal asphalt reflecting the city's gray sky and amber storefront lights. Atmospheric London rain-haze, sharp amber highlights. Deep focus, ultra-sharp detail from the foreground railing to the background graffiti. No robots, no drones, no mechanical parts in frame.
